item.title: B+ dump
item.description: That moment in MoM where she whispers in that guy's ear... ?
item.dc:creator: FurryBallsPloppedMenacingly

item.title: Her name is Angeli Rose Gomez
item.description: Her name is Angeli Rose Gomez, a farm supervisor that drove 40 miles to the school.⁣ ⁣ Police then ARRESTED HER. Put her in handcuffs. When she demanded that they intervene and save the kids. ⁣ ⁣ She convinced someone to take the cuffs off.⁣ ⁣ Then ignored their warnings and barriers, marched into the school, and got her two kids.⁣ ⁣ All while police sat on their asses and did NOTHING.
item.dc:creator: mfrybeasley

item.title: Interesting Fact.
item.description: Lavinia Ellen "Vinnie" Ream Hoxie (September 25, 1847 – November 20, 1914) was an American sculptor. Her most famous work is the statue of U.S. President Abraham Lincoln in the U.S. Capitol rotunda.
item.dc:creator: Ice2Ice2

item.description: Face it. I bet you do

item.dc:creator: reservatio

item.title: Friday at the Star Wars Celebration in Anaheim.
item.description:
We did this one just for you, my Dudes!
With Dude Vader.
John Brummet did the Force Ghost before anyone else. I was glad to meet him. Outstanding guy.
With John Rhinehart, who plays a great Young Luke. Also a very, very nice guy. I'm lucky to know him.
Force ghost, Bistan, George (F)Lucas, me, Young Luke cosplay.
With the Frog Mom!!!
She had the tank and all! I did not get a pic of it. I has the dumb.
With Darth half-boy and Palps.
Heartburn time, old man!
From young Luke to dead Luke, in order.
With our boy, R2.
A Trooper I met while walking back from the store. He said "Hey, are you Fluke Skywalker? " Yep! Finally, I have people asking that vs. are you. Mark Hamill? That is a good thing for both Mark and me.
Not a cat tax but will a beef cake tax work? Tee hee. A fun shirt I brought to Anaheim. More pix from Disneyland tonight are heading your way, my Dudes. May the Force Be with you!
item.dc:creator: imflukeskywalker

item.title: Day 364: of cheeseburgers I want inside of me
item.description: The Raging Bull Double Beef Patties, Maple Smoked Bacon, American Cheese, Sautéed Hot Peppers, Cooked In Our House-made Spicy Chipotle Sauce From Holy Chuck In Toronto, Ontario, Canada Previous Day 363: https://imgur.com/gallery/tekBFF8 MESSAGE ME BURGER PICS OR YOUR FAVORITE BURGER SPOTS! Map of all burger spots that are available on yelp! Big thanks to @OhBoyDoIHaveNews4U for this. Link to his post and map https://imgur.com/gallery/vcObDuD @CrisprCAS Daily Tag 1 Day Remains

item.title: the original didn't go far enough
item.description: You ever watch a movie and go "man, that actor was amazing who was that?" only to see "GARY OLDMAN" in the credits?

item.title: Say it...
item.description: If this image hurts, disturbs, or makes you uncomfortable. Good, it means you're capable of feeling something, unlike an overwhelming majority of our leadership. Let it help drive you to push forward the changes the U.S desperately needs.

item.title: Across the street from the NRA convention: “Am I next?”
item.description: This group is walking around the NRA convention with a child-sized casket and holding up photos of kids killed in Uvalde. “Protect our kids, not guns!” Sauce: https://twitter.com/Mike_Hixenbaugh/status/1530237750791876613

item.title: Momma! Where are you?!!!
item.description: as long as its ears are not curling up, mom is nearby. Curling ears = abandoned and needs help. This fawn is fine in my opinion.
item.dc:creator: Rammsteinstochter

item.title: “Let’s blame video games and low church attendance.”
item.dc:creator: sleeperkid

item.title: BU’s Prof. Jon Levy on masking up
item.description:
Felt like this deserved a posting
especially given how most people have stopped wearing masks,
which can be fine given the setting,
but absolutely should not make those who are still masked up with feel bad or guilty for doing so.
Because we aren’t.
Regardless of if we’re doing so for ourselves, our loved ones, or just because we want to. Stay safe people, and let others take whatever precautions they feel are necessary. Source: https://twitter.com/jonlevybu Edit: Most viral? I shall revel in the irony of that. :)
item.dc:creator: HomeRunWoman

item.title: What we know about the Uvalde Police training for active shooters
item.description:
In short, they didn't follow through on a god damned thing they were trained to do. Full thread here: https://twitter.com/ByMikeBaker/status/1530357140191186944
https://www.nytimes.com/2022/05/27/us/active-shooting-trainings.html
https://www.nytimes.com/2022/05/26/us/mass-shooting-school-security.html
https://www.nytimes.com/2022/05/27/us/active-shooting-trainings.html
https://www.washingtonpost.com/nation/2022/05/27/uvalde-shooting-police-gunman-shot-olivarez/
https://www.nytimes.com/live/2022/05/27/us/texas-school-shooting
item.dc:creator: drhobotron
